critic_justifications.NY Times: Frank Rich's 1987 review was respectful but reserved about the thriller's conventional mechanics.
critic_justifications.Variety: Trade review acknowledged the show's effective suspense and audience appeal despite predictable plotting.
critic_justifications.NY Post: Positive reception of the production's entertainment value and lead performance in the original run.

audience_justifications.Show-Score: Audience ratings have remained solidly positive, reflecting the show's sustained appeal and loyal fanbase over decades.
audience_justifications.Broadway Scorecard: Consistent positive audience reception documented through Broadway Scorecard's historical data for the long-running production.
